isi.lyrics:
Lyric Ants - 한밤의 피크닉 (Midnight Picnic)

Romanization

joyonghi
naeryeoanjeun noeul
majuchin du nune
urimanui teukbyeolhaejil
harureul yeoreo

seorap sok
gipi itdeon raempeu
pogeunhan damyowa
akkyeodueotdeon waindo
ppajimyeon an doel geot gata

garodeung mit naranhan geurimja
gureum ttara georeogabomyeon
chorokbit eondeokkaji ije han georeum

byeolbichi heureugo
neoreul dameun barami seumyeodeureowa
seolleneun maeumeun nopi chaolla
haneureul neoro muldeuryeo

eunhasu pilleum sok
sajin ane dalbitboda deo numbusin
jigeum i sunggan hambamui pikeunik

modeungge goyohaejin bam
puripsorikkajido
urideul iyagiro
chaewojyeoman ga

namuarae banjjagin bandipbul
geu bittara georeogabomyeon
meoreotdeon dal kkeutkkaji ije han georeum

byeolbichi heureugo
neoreul dameun barami seumyeodeureowa
seolleneun maeumeun nopi chaolla
haneureul neoro muldeuryeo

eunhasu pilleum sok
sajin ane dalbitboda deo numbusin
jigeum i sunggan hambamui pikeunik

bamhaneul byeoldeureul damaseo
jomyeongeul bichulkka
neomu gwahajin anke hana dul

ne nundongja soge bichineun
geu bicheul ieoseo
i sungganeul geuryeo
nae mame cheoncheonhi

nae mameun peojigo
ne sumgyeoreul dameun barami bureowa
amu saenggageopsi meonghani nuwo
haengbogi byeol geongga sipeo

eunhasu pilleum sok
sajin ane dalbitboda deo numbusin
jigeum i sunggan hambamui pikeunik


Hangeul

조용히
내려앉은 노을
마주친 두 눈에
우리만의 특별해질
하루를 열어

서랍 속
깊이 있던 램프
포근한 담요와
아껴두었던 와인도
빠지면 안 될 것 같아

가로등 밑 나란한 그림자
구름 따라 걸어가보면
초록빛 언덕까지 이제 한 걸음

별빛이 흐르고
너를 담은 바람이 스며들어와
설레는 마음은 높이 차올라
하늘을 너로 물들여

은하수 필름 속
사진 안에 달빛보다 더 눈부신
지금 이 순간 한밤의 피크닉

모든게 고요해진 밤
풀잎소리까지도
우리들 이야기로
채워져만 가

나무아래 반짝인 반딧불
그 빛따라 걸어가보면
멀었던 달 끝까지 이제 한 걸음

별빛이 흐르고
너를 담은 바람이 스며들어와
설레는 마음은 높이 차올라
하늘을 너로 물들여

은하수 필름 속
사진 안에 달빛보다 더 눈부신
지금 이 순간 한밤의 피크닉

밤하늘 별들을 담아서
조명을 비출까
너무 과하진 않게 하나 둘

네 눈동자 속에 비치는
그 빛을 이어서
이 순간을 그려
내 맘에 천천히

내 맘은 퍼지고
네 숨결을 담은 바람이 불어와
아무 생각없이 멍하니 누워
행복이 별 건가 싶어

은하수 필름 속
사진 안에 달빛보다 더 눈부신
지금 이 순간 한밤의 피크닉

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Namu - I will keep you

Romanization

how many times i cry for you
how many times i endure for you
You try to survive every day
oh every night
even though you destroy and hurt me again, only thing i can give you

i will keep you
Even if you forget everything
i will keep you
so don't be afraid
i will keep you
Even if it feels like everything is
going to disappear

how many lies will disappoint you?
how many tries can make it better?
how deep should I go through the darkness to see even the smallest light?
If you get lost and feel alone

i will keep you
Even if you forget everything
i will keep you
so don't be afraid
i will keep you
Even if it feels like everything is
going to disappear

i will keep you
i will keep you
i will keep you
i will keep you

Hangeul

how many times i endure for you
You try to survive every day
oh every night
even though you destroy and hurt me again, only thing i can give you

i will keep you
Even if you forget everything
i will keep you
so don't be afraid
i will keep you
Even if it feels like everything is
going to disappear

how many lies will disappoint you?
how many tries can make it better?
how deep should I go through the darkness to see even the smallest light?
If you get lost and feel alone

i will keep you
Even if you forget everything
i will keep you
so don't be afraid
i will keep you
Even if it feels like everything is
going to disappear

i will keep you
i will keep you
i will keep you
i will keep you

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Lee Hayan - 듣고 있다면 (Listen)

Romanization

gateun sijakgwa dareun kkeut
dareun iyuneun dareun jigeumeul
gyeolguk ireolgeol geuttae waegeuraesseulkka
dasi ireolgeol nan wae geuraesseosseulkka

naneun ajik aninde ige aniyeonneunde
ajik yeoginde nan ije yeoginde
dasi ireolgeol gwaenhi maeil ireolgeol
neoga anin dareun geomman nameun nae binjariman

gateun noraereul deutgo itdamyeon gateun georireul geotgo itdamyeon
uri geunareul tteoollyeo bonjeok hoksi itdamyeon
gateun saenggageul hago itdamyeon gateun kkumsoge utgo ulgo itdamyeon
geujeo naegero omyeon dwae

naneun ajik aninde ige aniyeonneunde
ajik yeoginde nan ije yeoginde
dasi ireolgeol gwaenhi maeil ireolgeol
neoga anin dareun geomman nameun nae binjariman

gateun noraereul deutgo itdamyeon gateun georireul geotgo itdamyeon
uri geunareul tteoollyeo bonjeok hoksi itdamyeon
gateun saenggageul hago itdamyeon gateun kkumsoge utgo ulgo itdamyeon
geujeo naegero omyeon dwae

neomu geuriwo dasi nareul anajwo
dasi naeson jabajullae naege neomani piryohae

gateun noraereul deutgo itdamyeon gateun georireul geotgo itdamyeon
uri geunareul tteoollyeo bonjeok hoksi itdamyeon
gateun saenggageul hago itdamyeon gateun kkumsoge utgo ulgo itdamyeon
geujeo naegero omyeon dwae

Hangeul

같은 시작과 다른 끝
다른 이유는 다른 지금을
결국 이럴걸 그때 왜그랬을까
다시 이럴걸 난 왜 그랬었을까

나는 아직 아닌데 이게 아니였는데
아직 여긴데 난 이제 여긴데
다시 이럴걸 괜히 매일 이럴걸
너가 아닌 다른 것만 남은 내 빈자리만

같은 노래를 듣고 있다면 같은 거리를 걷고 있다면
우리 그날을 떠올려 본적 혹시 있다면
같은 생각을 하고 있다면 같은 꿈속에 웃고 울고 있다면
그저 내게로 오면 돼

나는 아직 아닌데 이게 아니였는데
아직 여긴데 난 이제 여긴데
다시 이럴걸 괜히 매일 이럴걸
너가 아닌 다른 것만 남은 내 빈자리만

같은 노래를 듣고 있다면 같은 거리를 걷고 있다면
우리 그날을 떠올려 본적 혹시 있다면
같은 생각을 하고 있다면 같은 꿈속에 웃고 울고 있다면
그저 내게로 오면 돼

너무 그리워 다시 나를 안아줘
다시 내손 잡아줄래 내게 너만이 필요해

같은 노래를 듣고 있다면 같은 거리를 걷고 있다면
우리 그날을 떠올려 본적 혹시 있다면
같은 생각을 하고 있다면 같은 꿈속에 웃고 울고 있다면

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Lex - Let Me Go

Romanization

Done with pretending
So why suffer more
I’m losing my patience
It’s hurting my core

Remember that one time
I stayed up for two nights
Standing back from the mirror surprised

I’m lost, I don’t know me
I’m losing my soul, please
Help me find myself again
Why is this going on

Is this what’s in my mind
I think I might lose sight
Cause sometimes it feels like
I need an answer
(I want to find a cure)

I’m running from myself
Cause I know I can do better
There’s no one here that cares
Plus, I don’t plan to take forever

You won’t win, I’m closer
So watch me make my plan now
It’s over, just give up

So let me go (oh)
Release my soul (oh)
I won’t be locked down by you (oh)
Yes, please let me go
Try and forget

All the things that made me realize
Baby I think I’m alright
Won’t ever let you down
Give us time

I think you broke me in real life
Maybe I shouldn’t think twice
Release me cause I’m done now


I couldn’t notice the truth
or even see that I changed
Who is this inside
Pointing at the sky

But even though it’s so true
I can’t deny what I am
I won’t stay stuck here

I’m running from myself
Cause I know I can do better
There’s no one here that cares
Plus, I don’t plan to take forever

You won’t win, I’m closer
So watch me make my plan now
It’s over, just give up

So let me go (oh)
Release my soul (oh)
I won’t be locked down by you (oh)
Yes, please let me go
Try and forget

I can feel the world sink
But I still have control
You’ll never get my mind

I’ll finally make you understand
Remember who you are
And feel the emotion

So let me go (oh)
Release my soul (oh)
I won’t be locked down by you (oh)
Yes, please let me go
Try and forget

All the things that made me realize
Baby I think I’m alright
Won’t ever let you down
Give us time

I think you broke me in real life
Maybe I shouldn’t think twice
Release me cause I’m done now
